_comment: DEV-TIME MCP servers for the team's Claude Code sessions only. NONE of these are product-runtime dependencies. The PRODUCT reaches the droomzaak Postgres through its OWN internal DataGateway (parameterized SQL) in the FastAPI backend — see .claude/rules/data-tiers.md. Secrets come from your shell env via ${VAR} interpolation; never hard-code tokens. Teammates are prompted ONCE to approve these on first use. soda-straw: kept purely as a dev-time exploration aid (NOT in the agent's read path); confirm exact URL + auth at sodastraw.ai/trial/start; if it uses OAuth instead of a static bearer, delete the headers block and let /mcp drive the flow on a 401. think-strategies: step_back/self_consistency/session-manager, used by spec-critic + demo-readiness-reviewer. context7: live version-correct library docs (works for many libs without a key).
